title: pre-commit fast-skip via staged-file scope_glob matching (Rec#8)
description: Add an early-exit fast path to the pre-commit hook: read staged file paths from git, match them against each agent's scope_glob from agents.meta.json, and exit 0 immediately if no staged file falls within any fabric-managed scope. This reduces non-fabric commit overhead from ~500ms (3 serial checks) to ~50ms (one git query + one glob match).

changes: At top of handler (before any existing checks): run `git diff --cached --name-only` to get staged file paths
Read agents.meta.json to get all scope_glob patterns across all registered agents
Test each staged file against scope_glob patterns using micromatch or minimatch (already in dep tree likely)
If zero staged files match any scope_glob: log 'No fabric-managed files staged, skipping checks' and exit 0
Otherwise: proceed with existing 3-check pipeline unchanged

implementation: Read pre-commit.ts lines 1-60 to understand the existing pipeline (sync-meta --check-only, human-lint, ledger-append --staged)
Check package.json dependencies for existing glob-matching library (micromatch, minimatch, picomatch)
Add getStagedFiles(): string[] helper using execa or child_process to run git diff --cached --name-only
Add matchesFabricScope(stagedFiles, agentsMeta): boolean using glob matching
Insert fast-path guard at top of handler: if (!matchesFabricScope(...)) return exit(0)
Add --no-skip flag or FABRIC_PRE_COMMIT_SKIP=false env override for emergency bypass
Test with a commit that changes only non-fabric files (e.g. README.md) and confirm near-instant exit

reference.pattern: Staged-file filtering pattern (common in lint-staged, husky configs)
reference.examples: Read scope_glob from agents.meta.json (same pattern as sync-meta); use existing meta-reader utility

rationale.chosen_approach: Early-exit guard using existing agents.meta scope_glob data — no new data structures needed
alternatives_considered: Cache staged files in a temp file between hook invocations (too complex, hooks are short-lived)
Skip pre-commit entirely via --no-verify (defeats the purpose; not user-transparent)
decision_factors: agents.meta.json is already read by other commands; one read is acceptable for a fast-path decision
scope_glob is the canonical source of which files are fabric-managed — semantically correct filter
rationale.tradeoffs: One extra readFile call for agents.meta.json at hook start; offset by saving 3 serial checks on every non-fabric commit

risks.description: Glob matching edge cases: scope_glob patterns with ** may not match correctly depending on library behavior
risks.mitigation: Use micromatch which is the standard in Node.js tooling; test with sample scope_glob patterns from real agents.meta.json
risks.fallback: If uncertain, err toward running full checks (false negatives are safe, false positives just slow)

criteria: Committing only non-fabric files (e.g. README.md) exits pre-commit in < 100ms
Committing fabric-managed files still runs the full 3-check pipeline
pre-commit.ts reads scope_glob from agents.meta.json, not a hardcoded list
FABRIC_PRE_COMMIT_SKIP=false or equivalent override forces full checks
convergence.verification: Time `git commit` with only README.md staged on a repo with agents.meta.json present; confirm < 100ms; then stage a fabric-managed file and confirm full pipeline runs
convergence.definition_of_done: Non-fabric commits complete the pre-commit hook in under 100ms with a clear log message explaining the skip

unit: matchesFabricScope: returns false when staged files contain only non-glob-matching paths
matchesFabricScope: returns true when at least one staged file matches a scope_glob
getStagedFiles: parses git diff --cached --name-only output correctly
manual_checks: Stage only package.json (not fabric-managed), run pre-commit hook, confirm 'skipping checks' message and fast exit
Stage a file matching an agent's scope_glob, run pre-commit hook, confirm full pipeline runs
success_metrics: 0 false negatives: fabric-managed staged files always trigger full pipeline

commit.message_template: feat(cli): pre-commit fast-skip via scope_glob staged-file match
